name: rabbit-feature
summary: Owns the rabbit-feature-touch orchestration skill and (absorbed) the rabbit-feature-scope skill with its resolve-scope.py and format-feature-context.py scripts. Dispatcher-side surface; executor-side (tdd-step.py, dispatch-tdd-subagent.py, 9-step cycle) lives in tdd-subagent.
deprecation_criterion: When feature-touch orchestration is natively handled by the rabbit CLI or by Claude Code's native workflow mechanism.
spec_no_change_reason: spec already committed in this cycle (b9a9e1bc); diff vs HEAD is empty
